title: German Sermon 52: Blessed Are the Poor in Spirit
description: The most radical sermon ever preached: true poverty means wanting nothing, knowing nothing, having nothing — not even God.
introduction: The most radical sermon ever preached: true poverty means wanting nothing, knowing nothing, having nothing — not even God.

translation.text: A person should be so poor that he is not even a place where God could work. As long as there is a place, there is still something.
